rulings.Case Title: ROBERT L. FARMER AS TRUSTEE OF THE MARSHALL I. WAIS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Wais Motion, Application For Temporary Stay Of Enforcement Of Discovery Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Pursuant to the 6/13/14 Order of the Court of Appeal in A142015, the motions are restored to calendar. Hearing required.
